_policy.pricing: Flipkart prices are marketplace-specific and must not overwrite website prices without approval. The website price in src/lib/mock/products.ts (and any future ORDS source) remains the canonical/direct Welta price. The cart subtotal and the WhatsApp order message continue to use the website price.
_policy.ui: Flipkart price is NOT displayed on the PDP at this time. This preview is reconciliation data only.
_policy.aliases: The only confirmed Flipkart→Welta SKU alias today is SLEEVLES BLACK TOP → GRG680519172076. Other aliases stay blank until manual confirmation.

normalizationRule: trim leading/trailing whitespace; collapse internal multiple whitespace into a single space; case-sensitive compare
